source.description: Six-panel generated raster contact sheet reviewed before cropping; final panel saved as the finished master.
source.notes: Contact-sheet-first workflow, no labels or embedded text.

process_strategy: The truck stays in the same side-view pose while each frame adds visible structure before the final only darkens, shades, and clarifies established parts.

final_elements.name: two wheel circles and long baseline
final_elements.description: Two round tires sitting on the same ground line.

final_elements.name: cab, hood, and pickup bed silhouette
final_elements.description: A boxy side-view cab connected to a front hood and rear pickup bed.

final_elements.name: rounded fenders and tailgate
final_elements.description: Curved fenders over both wheels plus a vertical tailgate edge.

final_elements.name: window, door seam, grille, headlights, and bumpers
final_elements.description: Readable cab window, door line, front grille, headlights, and simple bumpers.

final_elements.name: wheel hubs, tire shadows, and restrained blue-gray shading
final_elements.description: Small hubs, soft ground shadows, and light color on the already drawn body panels.

frames.visible_job: Places the long baseline, two wheel circles, and simple body guide boxes.
introduces: two wheel circles and long baseline

frames.visible_job: Connects the cab, hood, and pickup bed as one side-view silhouette.
introduces: cab, hood, and pickup bed silhouette
requires_prior_elements: two wheel circles and long baseline

frames.visible_job: Refines the body with fenders, roof curve, bed rail, and tailgate edge.
requires_prior_elements: cab, hood, and pickup bed silhouette

frames.visible_job: Adds the window, door seam, grille, headlights, and bumpers.
introduces: window, door seam, grille, headlights, and bumpers
requires_prior_elements: cab, hood, and pickup bed silhouette

frames.visible_job: Adds wheel hubs, tire shadows, and restrained blue-gray shading to existing panels.
introduces: wheel hubs, tire shadows, and restrained blue-gray shading
requires_prior_elements: two wheel circles and long baseline
cab, hood, and pickup bed silhouette
window, door seam, grille, headlights, and bumpers

final_step.visible_job: Darkens keeper contours and clarifies the existing cab, bed, wheels, details, shading, and shadows.
allowed_changes: clarification of existing grille, window, door, fenders, and hubs

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
